user.description: Connect to your Ksenia Lares alarm panel. If you need help, see the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

data.host: IP Address / Host of the Ksenia

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Ksenia Lares controller on the local network.
data_description.port: The Port number to use to connect to the Ksenia controller
data_description.username: HTTP Basic Auth username for the Ksenia controller.
data_description.password: HTTP Basic Auth password for the Ksenia controller.

init_option.title: Ksenia Lares Options
init_option.description: Configure polling and scenario execution settings.

data_description.refresh_period: How often to poll zone and partition status (5 to 300 seconds).
data_description.pin: Encrypted PIN code required to execute some scenarios. Leave empty if not needed.

reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for this integration. The controller IP address cannot be changed here.

data_description.username: HTTP Basic Auth username for the Ksenia controller.
data_description.password: HTTP Basic Auth password for the Ksenia controller.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Integration
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Please provide updated credentials to restore access.

error.connection: Unable to connect to the Ksenia controller. Check the IP address and network.

abort.already_configured: This Ksenia controller is already configured.

init.title: Ksenia Lares Options
init.description: Configure polling and scenario execution settings.

data_description.refresh_period: How often to poll zone and partition status (5 to 300 seconds).
data_description.pin: Encrypted PIN code required to execute some scenarios. Leave empty if not needed.

authentication_failed.message: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.

update_failed.message: Failed to fetch data from the Ksenia Lares controller.
